settings.title: Accelerate Project Delivery and Build PM Talent That Drives Firm Success

settings.editor: AEC PM Connect 2026 is the only in-person event in the AEC industry designed to equip current project managers and the leaders who grow them with practical tools, proven strategies, and real-world frameworks that improve project outcomes and strengthen organizational capability—starting the moment you return to work.
Sponsors
Keen Wealth Advisors

AEC PM Connect is a focused, highly interactive, peer-driven event designed for AEC project managers and L&D leaders who want practical tools they can apply immediately, along with the opportunity to participate in real conversations, share ideas, and connect in person with experienced project managers and PM developers who are recognized leaders in the industry.

The first AEC PM Connect event was held in 2024 by Anthony Fasano, P.E., AEC PM, and the Engineering Management Institute, and its success led to the event becoming an ongoing experience for the AEC community.

High-stakes Communication: A Foundational Workshop
Experience for Project Managers with Dan Oblinger

Wednesday, October 21, 2026
Pre-Event Workshop | 1:00 – 4:00 PM
Keen Wealth Advisors, Overland Park

Welcome Reception
Sponsored by Keen Wealth Advisors

Wednesday, October 21, 2026
4:30 – 6:00 PM
Keen Wealth Advisors, Overland Park
AEC PM Connect Kansas 2026

Thursday, October 22, 2026
8:30 AM – 4:30 PM
Johnson County Community College
Closing Reception

Thursday, October 22, 2026
4:30 – 6:00 PM
Johnson County Community College

This event is ideal for:
  • Current AEC project managers who want to deliver projects with greater confidence, efficiency, and leadership impact.
  • Talent developers, leaders, and people managers who are responsible for building, training, and retaining high-performing project management teams.

You can expect a full day of engaging keynotes, interactive learning sessions, and practical discussions focused on emerging trends, leadership strategies, and proven best practices that elevate project delivery and team success. The event also provides valuable opportunities to connect with peers, expand your network, and share lessons learned with fellow professionals in the AEC community.

In addition, the event will feature an exclusive three-hour pre-event workshop with Dan Oblinger, Hostage Negotiator, keynote speaker, author, and negotiation coach. Held on October 25th, 2026 at Keen Wealth Advisors in Overland Park, this immersive session will deliver practical, high-impact negotiation strategies designed to elevate leadership effectiveness and decision-making. Located just minutes from Johnson County Community College, the workshop offers a powerful way to kick off the experience before the main event begins the following day.

Throughout the event, you’ll engage in:

  • Real-world discussions grounded in AEC project challenges
  • Interactive sessions designed for practical application
  • Peer-to-peer learning with experienced project managers
  • Dedicated time for networking and idea sharing

We are actively coordinating speakers and offering opportunities for topic-specific experts, panelists, and facilitators. If you're interested in speaking at AEC PM Connect Kansas City 2026, please contact us.

premium_gallery_img_content.premium_gallery_img_name: Anthony Fasano, PE, AEC PM, F. ASCE

settings.editor:
We hope you’re excited to visit 2026 AEC PM Connect Kansas!

The AEC PM Connect event will take place at Johnson County Community College located at
Overland Park, Kansas.

There are a number of accommodations in the area.
*Marriott Kansas City Overland Park is the closest option, just a few minutes walk.*
BOOK YOUR ROOM

Room Rate: $235 per night (as per March 2026)

Please Note: This is not a room block; this is only a recommendation from the AEC PM Connect team.
 
We encourage you to make your room reservations as soon as possible to secure the best rate available.

Partner with AEC PM Connect to
Grow Your Influence

AEC PM Connect provides partners with a valuable opportunity to strengthen their brand, grow their network, and connect with a highly skilled audience of AEC project management professionals. 

This opportunity for sponsors is different from most industry events in that the AEC PM Connect audience is very engaged and there are many opportunities for real conversations. Sponsorship offers exceptional visibility, meaningful connections, and a platform to establish thought leadership in AEC project management. It’s an ideal way to show your dedication to the industry while showcasing your expertise and innovative approaches to project management.
If you would like to discuss, please contact us through the form below.
Stay Informed and Get Involved!
Register today! You will receive event updates, agenda announcements, and important information leading up to the event.

slides.content: I enjoyed the different options and topics that were available. Overall it was a great conference and networking with others and making new connections were extremely valuable.
slides.name: Chris Schultz
slides.title: Lochmueller

slides.content: AEC Connect has helped me build relationships with other project managers by giving us a small intimate environment so you really can have good conversations and build that relationship rather than just a quick hi.
slides.name: Karen Delgado
slides.title: Colliers Engineering & Design

slides.content: I’ve learned a lot of things that I wasn’t aware of before I came here, and being able to put those into practice when I get back to my organization will help me grow.
slides.name: Rodney Williams
slides.title: Atwell

slides.content: I think events like AECPM Connect are really important for the PM community because you get to hear what’s going on outside of your own organization.
slides.name: Brian Sullivan
slides.title: Trinovate Advisors

slides.content: There are a lot of individuals facing the same struggles as I am. Getting that opportunity to talk to individuals about how they are coming up with ways to solve their issues without having to reinvent the wheel has been very beneficial to me.
slides.name: Kingsley Kantanka
slides.title: POWER Engineers

slides.content: That networking opportunity was some of the most valuable… hearing how other companies are doing various benchmarking of their successes was just really helpful.
slides.name: Michelle Kratzer
slides.title: GFT

slides.content: Come with an open mind and your list of questions on issues that you’re having.
slides.name: Paul Tierney
slides.title: Emery Sapp & Sons

slides.content: I think the importance of events like this to help promote bettering yourself as a project manager is imperative.
slides.name: Tori Colombatto
slides.title: Parsons

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: Join AEC PM Connect 2026 in Kansas for exclusive networking, expert insights, and game-changing strategies in AEC project management!
